title: AlgeBench Lesson
description: Schema for AlgeBench lesson and scene JSON files. Supports both single-scene format (with top-level 'elements') and multi-scene lesson format (with 'scenes' array).

lessonFormat.description: Multi-scene lesson format with a 'scenes' array.

title.description: Lesson title displayed in the UI header. Example: "Eigenvalues & Eigenvectors".

import.description: Domain library names to import from static/domains/<name>/index.js. These register additional math functions available in expressions. Example: ["astrodynamics"].

unsafe.description: When true, marks the lesson as containing native JavaScript expressions (IIFEs, loops) that require user trust approval before execution. Default: false.

unsafeExplanation.description: Human-readable explanation of why this lesson uses unsafe JS, shown in the trust dialog. Example: "This lesson uses scene-level reusable functions with IIFE loops."

proof.description: Root-level proof(s) visible across all scenes. Can be a single proof object or an array of proofs.

scenes.description: Array of scenes in the lesson. Each scene has its own 3D elements, steps, camera, and optional proof.

description.description: Short description of the scene shown below the title.

markdown.description: Markdown content for the explanation panel (supports KaTeX via $...$ and $$...$$).

prompt.description: System prompt for the AI chat tutor in this scene.

unsafe.description: Marks scene as containing native JS.

unsafeExplanation.description: Explanation for unsafe JS trust dialog.

cameraUp.description: Camera up vector [x,y,z]. Default: [0,1,0]. Alias for camera.up.

views.description: Named camera presets shown as buttons.

functions.description: Reusable math functions available in expressions.

elements.description: Base scene elements rendered on load.

scene.description: A single scene within a lesson, containing 3D elements and optional steps.

title.description: Scene title displayed in the navigation dock. Example: "$P(A)$ — Prior".

description.description: Short description of the scene shown below the title. Supports markdown.

markdown.description: Markdown content for the explanation/documentation panel. Supports KaTeX math via $inline$ and $$display$$ delimiters.

prompt.description: System prompt for the AI chat tutor in this scene. Tells the AI what/how to teach. Example: "You are a patient tutor helping a student understand Bayes' theorem..."

scale.description: Axis scale factors as [sx,sy,sz]. Default: [1,1,1]. Use to stretch/compress axes.

camera.description: Initial camera position and target for this scene.

cameraUp.description: Camera up vector [x,y,z]. Default: [0,1,0]. Alternative to camera.up.

views.description: Named camera presets rendered as clickable buttons. Example: Overview, Face On, Iso.

functions.description: Reusable scene-level functions callable from expressions. Registered in the math.js sandbox.

starfield.description: Background starfield configuration for space-themed scenes.

elements.description: Base scene elements rendered when the scene loads (before any steps).

steps.description: Incremental steps that add/remove elements and sliders. Navigated with Next/Prev.

proof.description: Proof(s) associated with this scene. Displayed in the proof panel.

duration.description: Auto-play duration in milliseconds for the base scene (before step 0). Default: 3000.

step.description: An incremental step that adds/removes elements and configures sliders.

title.description: Step title shown in the dock and caption bar. Supports KaTeX. Example: "$P(A)$ — Prior".

description.description: Step description shown in the caption overlay. Supports markdown and KaTeX.

prompt.description: Per-step system prompt override for the AI chat tutor.

add.description: Elements to add in this step. Each element must have a 'type' field.

remove.description: Directives to hide elements or sliders from previous steps.

sliders.description: Slider definitions added in this step. Sliders create interactive parameters for expressions.

camera.description: Camera override for this step. Animates to this position when navigating to the step.

info.description: Info overlay panels displayed during this step.

range.description: Override axis ranges for this step.

virtualTime.description: Virtual time expression that replaces the default wall-clock 't' variable.

duration.description: Auto-play duration in milliseconds for this step. Default: 3000.

caption.description: Short caption text displayed in the step caption bar. Overrides auto-generated caption from title.

element.description: A 3D visual element. The 'type' field determines which renderer is used and which properties are valid.

type.description: Element type determining the renderer. Must be one of the supported types.

id.description: Unique element ID for referencing in remove directives, legend toggle, and element registry. Auto-generated from label if omitted.

label.description: Display label rendered near the element. Supports KaTeX via $...$. Example: "$\mathbf{v} = (1,0)$".

color.description: Element color as hex string '#rrggbb' or RGB array [r,g,b] with values 0-1. Default varies by type.

opacity.description: Element opacity 0-1. Can be a math.js expression string for animated elements. Default varies by type.

width.description: Line/stroke width in pixels. Default varies by type (axis: 2, line: 3, parametric_curve: 3).

size.description: Point size in pixels (for 'point' type). Default: 12.

position.description: Position in data space as [x,y,z]. Used by point, sphere, cylinder, text.

center.description: Center position [x,y,z]. Used by sphere, ellipsoid, cylinder. Alias for position.

from.description: Start point [x,y,z] for vectors, lines, cylinders.

to.description: End point [x,y,z] for vectors, lines, cylinders.

origin.description: Origin point [x,y,z] for vectors. Alias for 'from'. Default: [0,0,0].

points.description: Array of points for lines, polygons, animated_line. Each point is [x,y,z] (numbers or expression strings).

vertices.description: Array of vertex positions for polygon/animated_polygon. Each is [x,y,z] (numbers or expression strings).

range.description: Range for parametric types [tMin,tMax] or axis range [-5,5]. Components can be numbers or math.js expression strings. For vector_field: [[xMin,xMax],[yMin,yMax],[zMin,zMax]].

samples.description: Number of sample points for curves/surfaces. Default: 128 (parametric_curve), 200 (animated_curve).

axis.description: Which axis this element represents (for 'axis' type) or cylinder axis direction.

radius.description: Radius for sphere, cylinder, animated_point. Default: 1 (sphere/cylinder), 0.25 (animated_point).

radiusExpr.description: Math.js expression string for dynamic radius. Use slider IDs and 't'. Example: "Rp".

x.description: Math.js expression for X component. Used by parametric types and surfaces. Example: "cos(t)". Use math.js syntax (sin, cos, pi) NOT JavaScript (Math.sin).

y.description: Math.js expression for Y component. Example: "sin(t)".

z.description: Math.js expression for Z component. Example: "0".

expr.description: Expression(s) for animated elements. Array of 3 math.js strings [x,y,z] for animated_vector/point, or single string for animated_curve/surface. Example: ["k*2", "k*1", "0"].

fromExpr.description: Math.js expression array [x,y,z] for dynamic start point of animated vectors/cylinders.

visibleExpr.description: Math.js boolean expression controlling visibility. Element is visible when expression evaluates to truthy. Example: "orbitImpactT(1) >= 0".

labelExpr.description: Math.js expression for dynamic label text. Result is displayed as the element's label.

labelOffset.description: Offset [dx,dy,dz] for label positioning relative to the element. Default: [0,0.3,0].

labelPosition.description: Explicit position [x,y,z] for the label instead of auto-computed.

uRange.description: U parameter range [min,max] for parametric surfaces. Default: [0, 2π].

vRange.description: V parameter range [min,max] for parametric surfaces. Default: [0, 2π].

uSamples.description: Resolution in U direction for parametric surfaces. Default: 32.

vSamples.description: Resolution in V direction for parametric surfaces. Default: 32.

widthSegments.description: Number of width segments for sphere/ellipsoid/cylinder geometry. Default: 32.

heightSegments.description: Number of height segments for sphere/ellipsoid geometry. Default: 20.

radialSegments.description: Number of radial segments for cylinder. Default: 32.

openEnded.description: Whether cylinder caps are open. Default: false.

style.description: Skybox style. 'solid' uses a single color, 'gradient' blends topColor to bottomColor.

topColor.description: Top color for gradient skybox. Example: "#080818".

bottomColor.description: Bottom color for gradient skybox. Example: "#030310".

starCount.description: Number of stars in the skybox. Default: 0 (no stars).

starColor.description: Star color as hex string. Default: '#e6efff'.

tickStep.description: Step between axis tick marks. Auto-calculated from range span if omitted.

shader.description: Material shader configuration for 3D objects (sphere, cylinder, polygon, parametric_surface).

text.description: Text content for 'text' type elements. Example: "Direction changed!".

trail.description: Trail effect configuration for animated_vector. Shows a fading trail behind the moving tip.

regular.description: Regular polygon configuration. When present, generates vertices automatically instead of using explicit vertices array.

outlineColor.description: Outline color for polygons. Defaults to the element color.

outlineOpacity.description: Outline opacity for polygons. Can be an expression string. Default: min(1, opacity * 2).

outlineWidth.description: Outline width for polygons. Can be an expression string. Default: 0 (no outline) or 1.5 for regular polygons.

fillRegions.description: Filled regions for animated_curve. Define areas above/below/between curves.

showCurve.description: Whether to show the curve line for animated_curve. Default: true.

rangeExpr.description: Dynamic range [minExpr, maxExpr] for animated_curve parameter.

expression.description: Alias for 'expr' (single string form). Math.js expression for surface z = f(x,y). Example: "x + y".

data.description: Alias for 'points'. Array of [x,y,z] points for line elements.

positionExpr.description: Alias for 'expr' on animated_point. Math.js expression array [x,y,z] for dynamic position.

toExpr.description: Alias for 'expr' on animated_vector/animated_cylinder. Math.js expression array [x,y,z] for dynamic endpoint.

centerExpr.description: Math.js expression array [x,y,z] for dynamic center position of sphere/ellipsoid.

fx.description: Math.js expression for vector field X component. Example: "y". Use math.js syntax.

fy.description: Math.js expression for vector field Y component. Example: "-x".

fz.description: Math.js expression for vector field Z component. Example: "0".

loop.description: Whether animated_vector keyframe animation loops. Default: true.

arrow.description: Whether animated_vector renders an arrowhead. Default: true.

arrowScale.description: Scale factor for animated_vector arrowhead size. Default: 1.

shaftScale.description: Scale factor for animated_vector shaft thickness. Default: 1.

keyframes.description: Keyframe array for animated_vector. Each keyframe defines a target position over time.

density.description: Vector field sample density per axis. Default: 3.

normal.description: Normal vector [x,y,z] for plane element. Default: [0,1,0].

point.description: Point on the plane [x,y,z] for plane element positioning. Default: [0,0,0].

height.description: Height for cylinder element when using center+axis specification. Default: 1.

value.description: Alias for 'text'. Text content for text elements.

depthZ.description: Manual depth offset for polygon/animated_curve render ordering. Auto-assigned if omitted.

renderOrder.description: Manual render order for polygon depth sorting. Auto-assigned if omitted.

removeDirective.description: Directive to hide elements or sliders. Use {id: '*'} to hide all elements, {type: 'slider'} to remove all sliders, or {id: 'some_id'} to hide a specific element.

id.description: Element ID to hide, or '*' to hide all elements.

type.description: Remove by type. Use 'slider' to remove all sliders, 'info' to remove info overlays, or an element type name.

slider.description: Interactive slider that creates a named parameter usable in math.js expressions.

id.description: Slider ID used as variable name in expressions. Example: 'pA' creates a variable pA. Must be a valid math.js identifier.

label.description: Display label for the slider. Supports KaTeX. Example: "$P(A)$". Defaults to the id.

step.description: Step increment for the slider. Default: 0.1.

default.description: Initial slider value. Default: midpoint of min and max.

animate.description: Whether the slider auto-animates (shows play/pause button). Default: false.

animateMode.description: Animation mode. 'loop': repeats 0→1→0→1; 'once': plays 0→1 then stops; 'bounce': triangle wave 0→1→0. Default: 'loop'.

autoplay.description: Whether animated slider starts playing automatically. Default: true.

duration.description: Animation cycle duration in milliseconds. Default: 3000.

reset.description: If true, previous slider state is snapshotted for undo on backward navigation.

camera.description: Camera configuration with position, target, and optional up vector.

position.description: Camera position in data space [x,y,z]. Default: [6,4,6].

target.description: Camera look-at target in data space [x,y,z]. Default: [0,0,0].

view.description: Named camera preset shown as a clickable button.

follow.description: Element ID to follow with the camera. The camera tracks this element's animated position.

offset.description: Offset [x,y,z] from the followed element's position.

angleLockAxis.description: Axis indices for angle-lock camera mode.

angleLockDirection.description: Element IDs defining the angle-lock direction vector.

angleLockVector.description: Element IDs defining the angle-lock reference vector.

sceneFunction.description: Reusable function registered in the math.js sandbox. Can be called from any expression in the scene.

name.description: Function name usable in expressions. Example: "hx" allows calling hx() in expressions.

args.description: Function argument names. Example: ["mode"] for a function that takes one argument.

expr.description: Function body as a math.js expression or IIFE JavaScript string. For complex logic, use an IIFE: "(()=>{...})()". Requires 'unsafe: true' at lesson level.

starfield.description: Background starfield rendered as point sprites in a spherical shell.

enabled.description: Whether starfield is visible. Default: true.

radiusMin.description: Inner radius of the star shell. Default: auto-calculated from scene range.

radiusMax.description: Outer radius of the star shell. Default: auto-calculated from scene range.

color.description: Star color as hex string. Default: '#d9e6ff'.

infoOverlay.description: Info panel overlay displayed during a step.

id.description: Unique overlay ID for removal. Example: "main_info".

content.description: Markdown content with KaTeX support. Slider values can be interpolated with {{sliderId}}. Example: "### $P(A)$\n$P(A) = {{pA}}$".

position.description: Screen position for the overlay. Default: 'top-left'.

pos.description: Alias for 'position'. Prefer 'position' in new scenes.

keep.description: If true, overlay persists across steps until explicitly removed. Default: false.

virtualTime.description: Virtual time expression that replaces the default wall-clock 't' variable. Allows slider-controlled time for scrubbing.

expr.description: Math.js expression producing the virtual time value. Use slider IDs. Example: "tau*T" where tau is a slider.

type.description: Three.js material type. 'basic': no lighting; 'phong': Phong shading (default); 'standard': PBR material.

shininess.description: Phong shininess exponent. Higher = sharper specular. Default: 40.

emissive.description: Emissive (self-glow) color as hex string. Example: "#112344".

specular.description: Specular highlight color as hex string. Example: "#99b5eb".

depthWrite.description: Whether the material writes to the depth buffer. Set false for transparent overlapping objects.

depthTest.description: Whether the material tests against the depth buffer.

flatShading.description: Use flat shading instead of smooth. Gives a faceted look.

trail.description: Trail effect for animated_vector showing a fading path behind the moving tip.

color.description: Trail color as hex string. Defaults to the element color.

length.description: Maximum number of trail points stored. Default: 200.

regularPolygon.description: Regular polygon generator. Creates N equidistant vertices in a circle.

n.description: Number of sides. Can be an expression string for animated polygons. Example: "N" (slider-driven).

radius.description: Circumradius. Can be an expression string. Default: 1.

center.description: Center position [x,y,z]. Components can be expression strings. Default: [0,0,0].

rotation.description: Rotation angle in radians. Can be an expression string. Default: 0.

fillRegion.description: Filled region between curves for animated_curve elements.

id.description: Optional ID for the fill region, used for referencing in remove directives.

color.description: Fill color. Defaults to the parent curve's color.

opacity.description: Fill opacity. Can be expression string. Default: 0.35.

above.description: Math.js expression for upper boundary curve.

below.description: Math.js expression for lower boundary curve.

outlineWidth.description: Outline width for the fill region.

outlineColor.description: Outline color. Defaults to the fill color.

proofOrProofArray.description: A single proof or array of proofs.

proof.description: A step-by-step mathematical proof or derivation displayed in the proof panel.

id.description: Unique proof ID for stable navigation state persistence across scene switches.

title.description: Proof title displayed in the panel header. Example: "Bayes' Theorem Derivation".

goal.description: Goal statement rendered with KaTeX. Shown at the top of the proof panel. Example: "P(A|B) = \\frac{P(B|A)P(A)}{P(B)}".

technique.description: Proof technique shown as a colored badge. 'derivation' is hidden (no badge shown).

techniqueHint.description: Tooltip text explaining why this technique was chosen. Shown on hover over the technique badge.

sceneStep.description: Scene step to navigate to when viewing the proof goal. Integer for step index, or 'sceneIdx:stepIdx' string. Enables bidirectional sync between proof and scene navigation.

prompt.description: System prompt for the AI when discussing this proof. Provides context about the proof for the chat tutor.

steps.description: Array of proof steps rendered sequentially.

proofStep.description: A single step in a mathematical proof.

type.description: Step type displayed as a badge. Common values: 'step', 'definition', 'axiom', 'theorem', 'lemma', 'assumption', 'substitution', 'simplification', 'conclusion'. Default: 'step'.

label.description: Step label/title. Example: "Apply definition of conditional probability".

math.description: LaTeX math expression rendered via KaTeX in display mode. Example: "P(A|B) = \\frac{P(A \\cap B)}{P(B)}". Can include highlight spans via \\htmlClass{hl-name}{content}.

justification.description: Short justification text rendered below the math. Supports inline KaTeX. Example: "By the multiplication rule".

explanation.description: Longer explanation rendered as markdown below the justification. For additional context.

prompt.description: System prompt hint for the AI when this proof step is active. Provides step-specific teaching guidance for the chat tutor.

tags.description: Tags displayed as small badges on the step. Example: ["algebra", "key-insight"].

highlights.description: Named highlight regions in the math expression. Keys match \\htmlClass{hl-<name>}{...} spans in the math field.

sceneStep.description: Scene step to sync to when this proof step is active. Integer for step index in current scene, or 'sceneIdx:stepIdx' for cross-scene.

proofHighlight.description: Highlight configuration for a named region in proof math expressions.

label.description: Tooltip and annotation text for the highlight. Shown on hover and click.

oneOf.description: Hex color string '#rrggbb' or '#rrggbbaa' with optional alpha. Example: '#ff6644' or '#ff664488'.

color.description: Color as hex string '#rrggbb' (or '#rrggbbaa' with alpha) or RGB array [r,g,b] with components 0-1.

vec3.description: 3D vector as [x,y,z]. Components can be numbers or math.js expression strings.

vec3OrExpr.description: 3D point [x,y,z] where each component can be a number or math.js expression string.
